25 Inspiring Web Designer & Developer Portfolios For 2026

Last Updated January 7 2026

Written By Steve Benjamins

I looked at a bunch of different portfolio websites and here’s what my biggest conclusion: a  web design or web developer portfolio should show, not tell. 

A good online portfolio gets out of the way and showcases the work. Are you a great WordPress developer? Show your best WordPress sites on your homepage. Do you have great development skills? Link to your GitHub. Are you looking for clients? Put testimonials front and center. Show your potential employers and potential clients— don’t just tell them. 

The best web developer portfolios get specific about their skillset. If you’re a front end developer get specific about your work with animations and frameworks like Bootstrap. If you’re a back end software developer, share your skills in the latest technologies. 

It can also be helpful to share your own personal projects on your own portfolio— personal projects are a chance to showcase the work you hope to do.

Tip: Use ← and → arrow keys to browse.

1. Akasha Michelle

Made With Squarespace

Akasha Michelle is a developer and UX designer located in South Dakota. She includes links to GitHub, Dribble, Vimeo and social media. She also has a blog and an eye catching color scheme on her portfolio!


2. Diana Lu

Made With Framer

Diana Lu’s portfolio showcases her work as a designer with a focus on art direction, branding, and digital experiences. The site highlights her creative projects, blending sleek, minimalist visuals with thoughtful user interactions. Her portfolio emphasizes storytelling through design, reflecting a modern and sophisticated aesthetic.


3. La Playa

Made With Squarespace

Náyade is a web designer and front end developer that works out of an island called Lanzarote. Her Squarespace portfolio features screenshots of projects where she has done design, development and occasionally, logo design for. She also includes links to her social media.


4. Georgi Valk

Made With Framer

Georgi Valkov’s website highlights his work as a multidisciplinary designer specializing in web design, branding, UX/UI, and motion graphics. With a playful and energetic tone, it showcases his portfolio, collaborations with well-known brands, and his passion for creating engaging, visually dynamic projects.


5. James Almond

Made With Squarespace

James is a Ruby on Rails web developer with over 10 years of experience in the field. He focuses on simplicity and user friendly ideas that provide functionality in a company website.


6. Jan Henneberg

Made With Framer

Jan Henneberg’s website showcases his expertise as a product designer with a focus on UX/UI, web design, and innovation in areas like AR and Web3. Currently at Canva, he highlights past work with companies like Kiwi.com, where he led design teams, and his co-founding role in projects like Hypernoon. The site offers insight into his skills, projects, and areas of interest, such as gaming and privacy.


7. Michael Mannucci

Made With Webflow

Michael is web developer based in Toronto that designs and develops websites with Statamic, Tailwind and Netlify.


8. Sonja Todd

Made With Squarespace

Sonja is a freelance web developer and comic creator. She helps take websites to a new level that is both visually appealing as well as well written.


9. Nick Stepuk

Made With Framer

Nick Stepuk’s website showcases his expertise as a design craftsman and Framer developer, specializing in creating interactive websites that help founders and creators deliver clear messages. The site highlights his design philosophy, recent projects, and a focus on combining aesthetics with functionality in web development.


10. Annie Rudisill

Made With Webflow

Annie is a web developer that covers an impressive range of technologies. Her portfolio includes work using Javascript frameworks (Node), graphic design, HTML and CSS and even motion graphics and animations.


11. Devon Stank

Made With Squarespace

Devon lives in Pennsylvania as a web developer. He works specifically with Squarespace— so he helps companies and startups take a Squarespace template to the next level. His portfolio includes clean, minimal animations.


12. Kate Gilbert

Made With Format

Kate Gilbert is a designer, illustrator and photographer located in Los Angeles. She has a specific connection to branding and font selection, but combines and applies all of her skills to each project.


13. Make it Dandy

Made With Carrd

Daniel Teeny is a designer with a reputation for excellence located in California. He works on website design, branding, logos, photography and more.


14. Josh Leibold

Made With Squarespace

Josh’s has a front end developer portfolio that showcases his works with Squarespace and Shopify templates. He also offers service in marketing automation and SEO.


15. Sherman Website Design

Made With Wix

Alan Sherman is the designer and marketer behind Sherman Website Design. Several years of experience have encouraged professional growth in the ever changing technology world, always learning something new.


16. Nima Yousefi

Made With Squarespace

Currently working out of Los Angeles, this software engineer and web developer works with iOs and Mac. His love of science led him to discover a passion in program development.


17. Lyn Muldrow

Made With Weebly

Lyn has more than 10 years of experience as a professional web developer. Her portfolio site also includes examples of graphic design and typography. She works with startups and companies and is an advocate for people of color and diversity in tech.


18. Michael Lackey

Made With GoDaddy

Michael Lackey is an engineer and full stack web developer— working in HTML, CSS and Javascript frameworks like Node. He’s also a passionate educator. Michael includes links to social media and Github on his portfoli.


19. Jessica Ruiters

Made With Wix

Jessica Ruiters is located in Toronto. Years ago she started as an Art Director and during that time discovered her passion in web design. She works as a user experience designer, web designer and graphic designer.


20. Jonathan McMaster

Made With Squarespace

Jonathan was a member of the Marine Corps before he became a web developer. He studied at Yale University and offers simplicity in his ideas and designs.


21. Josh Unger

Made With Squarespace

Josh is a web developer and designer that works primarily in Squarespace. I like his design portfolio— it has an eye-catching color scheme. He also has some great tutorials.


22. Kevin Waltermire

Made With Squarespace

Kevin is a designer and developer located in Arkansas. His work with popular companies such as Home Depot and Mercedes have been recognized with honors more than once.


23. Kani Leung

Made With GoDaddy

Kani Leung was born in Hong Kong and moved to New York to obtain her college education. She is now a successful project manager and web developer with her own studio. She creates simple and elegant web designs.


24. Erin E. Dawson

Made With Squarespace

Erin Dawson fell in love with the art of web development many years ago. The combination of logical science and the arts caught her attention and she looks forward to new and exciting projects.


25. Leilani Roylo

Made With Squarespace

Leilani is a web developer currently working from Seattle and perfecting her UX skills. Every design decision she makes within a project are a reflection of user feedback.


26. Sam Bohon

Made With Wix

Sam Bohon offers a little bit of everything including web development, marketing, design and administrative. His process is organized and his creativity is explorative creating unique websites and more.


27. Laura Hines

Made With Webflow

Laura Hines is a designer and developer that earned her degree from Flatiron School in New York. Her designs are sleek, provide problem solving, and create a unique experience using code.


28. Joe Stanford

Made With Webflow

Creating speedy and attractive websites are top priorities for Joe Stanford when working on new projects. He also teaches the client how to easily manage their own website, graphic design and advertising assistance.


29. Pub Light

Made With GoDaddy

Henry Hu is a UI design professional and a software developer. His personal portfolio includes examples of projects built with HTML and CSS as well as as C+ and Javascript— so he covers the full stack.
